BARD_KEYWORD_MAGIC.title: Magic
BARD_KEYWORD_MAGIC.description: The bard plays melodies to channel magical power
BARD_KEYWORD_SONG.title: Song
BARD_KEYWORD_SONG.description: Simple tunes composed by the bard, needing no magic—just the power of sound
BARD_KEYWORD_CHANT.title: Chant
BARD_KEYWORD_CHANT.description: Chant cards do not trigger immediately. Instead, they activate automatically at the start of your next turn. Cannot be interrupted by taking damage.
